narrative:
Hardin County has 17,300 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.0% of registrants.
